svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ FACE ALIGNMENT │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
Unaligned faces (variable pose): Aligned faces (normalized):
😊 😐 🙃 😐 😐 😐 ↙ ↓ ↘ ↓ ↓ ↓ tilted frontal tilted norm norm norm
Hard to compare! Easy to compare!
Alignment steps: 1. Detect facial landmarks (eyes, nose, mouth) 2. Compute transformation to canonical pose 3. Apply affine transform 4. Crop to standard size (e.g., 112×112)
